list.name: engine
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT engine FROM eval_runs ORDER BY engine

targets.rawSql: SELECT date AS time, wr AS value, engine AS metric FROM eval_runs WHERE $__timeFilter(date) AND (engine = ANY(string_to_array('$engine', ',')) OR '$engine' = 'All') ORDER BY date

SELECT date AS time, clip_rate AS value, engine AS metric FROM eval_runs WHERE $__timeFilter(date) AND clip_rate IS NOT NULL AND (engine = ANY(string_to_array('$engine', ',')) OR '$engine' = 'All') ORDER BY date

SELECT date AS time, latency_p50 AS value, engine || ' p50' AS metric FROM eval_runs WHERE $__timeFilter(date) AND latency_p50 IS NOT NULL AND (engine = ANY(string_to_array('$engine', ',')) OR '$engine'='All') ORDER BY date

SELECT date AS time, latency_p95 AS value, engine || ' p95' AS metric FROM eval_runs WHERE $__timeFilter(date) AND latency_p95 IS NOT NULL AND (engine = ANY(string_to_array('$engine', ',')) OR '$engine'='All') ORDER BY date

WITH latest AS (SELECT MAX(date) AS d FROM eval_runs) SELECT engine, AVG(wr) AS wr, AVG(clip_rate) AS clip_rate, AVG(latency_p50) AS p50, AVG(latency_p95) AS p95 FROM eval_runs, latest WHERE date = latest.d GROUP BY engine ORDER BY wr DESC
